title: Name table-driven test cases
scenario: Named cases make failing table-driven tests easier to diagnose and easier for humans to scan.
instructions: Create PercentageCase with name, input, and expected fields, then use it in a table-driven test.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps percentage-named-test-cases explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
